title: Evaluating Asymmetric Extraction for Optimal Orthodontic Outcomes: A Review
author: Heal Talk - A Journal of Clinical Dentistry
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Abstract This article introduces a new approach of orthodontic treatment planning that is asymmetrical type of orthodontic extraction which is currently being practiced without effecting post treatment results.Orthodontic extractions have been an important key for a good finishing of the case and since the introduction of serial extraction1 correct pattern of extraction has to be considered to achieve a balanced facial harmony. This article contains basic information related to atypical extraction and reviews about requirement of atypical extraction in different treatment modalities and its advantages and disadvantages. Keywords: Extraction, Atypical extraction, Orthodontic extraction, Asymmetrical extraction, Orthodontic Treatment plan.
